languages.text: "У нас есть песни про тайных слуг Бога-Императора, но мы бы никогда не смогли их распознать. Но почему..."

traits.locale_text: "В наших легендах рассказывают про тайных слуг Бога-Императора, но мы бы никогда не смогли их распознать. Значит, это их шаттл покоится внизу..." {n}Над переносицей Ведки собирается складка.{/n} "Но почему..."

languages.text: "We have songs about the God-Emperor's secret servants, but we would never have been able to recognize them. But why—"
languages.original_text: "У нас есть песни про тайных слуг Бога-Императора, но мы бы никогда не смогли их распознать. Но почему..."

traits.locale_text: "We have songs about the God-Emperor's secret servants, but we would never have been able to recognize them. But why..."
"We have songs about the God-Emperor's secret servants, but we would never have been able to recognize them. But why..."
"We have songs about the God-Emperor's secret servants, but we would never have been able to recognize them. But why—"
"We have songs about the God-Emperor's secret servants, but we would never have been able to recognize them. But why—"

languages.text: “我们确实有关于神皇秘密仆从的歌谣，但我们根本不可能认得出他们。可为什么——”
languages.original_text: "We have songs about the God-Emperor's secret servants, but we would never have been able to recognize them. But why—"

traits.locale_text: “我们确实有关于神皇秘密仆从的歌谣，但我们根本不可能认得出他们。可为什么——”

languages.text: "Tanrı İmparator'un gizli hizmetkârları hakkında şarkılarımız var ama onları asla tanımazdık. Neden..."
languages.original_text: "We have songs about the God-Emperor's secret servants, but we would never have been able to recognize them. But why—"

traits.locale_text: "Tanrı İmparator'un gizli hizmetkârları hakkında şarkılarımız var ama onları asla tanımazdık. Neden..."

languages.text: « Certaines de nos chansons évoquent des serviteurs secrets de l'Empereur-Dieu, mais nous n'aurions jamais été capables de les reconnaître. Pourquoi... »
languages.original_text: "We have songs about the God-Emperor's secret servants, but we would never have been able to recognize them. But why—"

traits.locale_text: « Certaines de nos chansons évoquent des serviteurs secrets de l'Empereur-Dieu, mais nous n'aurions jamais été capables de les reconnaître. Pourquoi... »

languages.text: «Tenemos canciones sobre los sirvientes secretos del Dios Emperador, pero nunca habríamos podido reconocerlos. ¿Por qué...?».
languages.original_text: "We have songs about the God-Emperor's secret servants, but we would never have been able to recognize them. But why—"

traits.locale_text: «Tenemos canciones sobre los sirvientes secretos del Dios Emperador, pero nunca habríamos podido reconocerlos. ¿Por qué...?».

languages.text: "Wir haben Lieder über die geheimen Diener des Gottimperators, konnten sie allerdings nie identifizieren. Aber warum ..."
languages.original_text: "We have songs about the God-Emperor's secret servants, but we would never have been able to recognize them. But why—"

traits.locale_text: "Wir haben Lieder über die geheimen Diener des Gottimperators, konnten sie allerdings nie identifizieren. Aber warum ..."

languages.text: 「神皇帝の秘密の使いについて歌があるけれど、僕たちは決して彼らを認識できなかっただろう。でもなぜ」
languages.original_text: "We have songs about the God-Emperor's secret servants, but we would never have been able to recognize them. But why—"

traits.locale_text: 「神皇帝の秘密の使いについて歌があるけれど、僕たちは決して彼らを認識できなかっただろう。でもなぜ」
